headline: Specialty Equipment Distributors Stocks Q4 Highlights: United Rentals (NYSE:URI)
summary: As the Q4 earnings season wraps, let’s dig into this quarter’s best and worst performers in the specialty equipment distributors industry, including United Rentals (NYSE:URI) and its peers.
